---
title: "MUFIS: Muscle Fiber Simulator"
author: "E. Miguel Díaz de León Muñóz"
date: 21/02/2025
format: 
    revealjs:  
        theme: white
        transition: slide
        center: true  
        slideNumber: true
        width: 1920
        height: 1080
        css: styles_paleovirtual.css
        logo: logo.png
        incremental: true
        controls: true
        progress: true
        chalkboard: true
---

# Introduction

-Biomechanical techniques and tools used to study the feeding behavior of extinct animals:
    -Finite Element Analysis (FEA)
    -Multibody Dynamics Analysis (MDA)
    -Dry skull method
